title: AbbVie to acquire a J&J-backed brain drugmaker for $1.4B
summary: AbbVie has agreed to acquire Aliada Therapeutics for $1.4 billion in cash, gaining a clinical-stage Alzheimer's antibody (ALIA-1758) and Johnson & Johnson's blood-brain barrier delivery technology. The deal, which includes a license to J&J's proprietary brain-drug transport platform supported by RA Capital Management, is expected to close by the end of 2024.
